CustomField.formula:
((leaseworks__Rent__c - leaseworks__Management_Fee__c )* leaseworks__Term_Mo__c ) - (leaseworks__Debt_Amortization_Payment__c * leaseworks__Term_Mo__c )
+ if(leaseworks__Net_Residual_Value_M__c >= leaseworks__Balloon_Payment__c , (leaseworks__Net_Residual_Value_M__c - leaseworks__Balloon_Payment__c) *1000000, 0 )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Rent net of management fee and loan payments along with the increment received if the Residual Value is greater than Balloon payment
CustomField.label: Net Cash Inflow
